title: ArcBio Continuous RNA Workflow - Post-PCR Instrument: Part 8 of 9: Library QC
author: Opentrons
description: With this 9 part workflow, the OT-2 will follow [ArcBio Continuous RNA Workflow - Pre-PCR Instrument and Post-PCR Instrument experimental protocol](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/43d313/ArcBio_RNA_Workflow_020922.xlsx) to convert up to 96 input RNA samples into cDNA libraries. This is Part 8 of 9: This OT-2 protocol uses the RNA Continuous Workflow, Post-PCR Instrument section of attached experimental protocol to perform library QC setup steps.
steps_raw: With this 9 part workflow, the OT-2 will follow [ArcBio Continuous RNA Workflow - Pre-PCR Instrument and Post-PCR Instrument experimental protocol](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/43d313/ArcBio_RNA_Workflow_020922.xlsx) to convert up to 96 input RNA samples into cDNA libraries. This is Part 8 of 9: This OT-2 protocol uses the RNA Continuous Workflow, Post-PCR Instrument section of attached experimental protocol to perform library QC setup steps.
Use the p20 multi to transfer Tapestation reagent to the Tapestation plate on the Magnetic Module.
Pause to prompt the user to place Qubit 8-tube Flex Strips on the Aluminum Block.
Use the p20 multi to transfer 2 uL of libaries to each of Qubit 8-tube Flex Strips and the Agilent 96-well Tapestation plate. Mix.
Use the p300 multi to transfer 198 uL Qubit solution from the reservoir to the Qubit 8-tube Flex Strips. Mix.
